data.content:
```latex
\begin{align*}
i_t &= \sigma(W^ix_t + U^ih_{t-1}) \\
f_t &= \sigma(W^fx_t + U^fh_{t-1}) \\
o_t &= \sigma(W^ox_t + U^oh_{t-1}) \\
\tilde{c}_t &= \tanh(W^cx_t + U^ch_{t-1}) \\
c_t &= i_t \odot \tilde{c}_t + f_t \odot + \tilde{c}_{t-1} \\
h_t &= o_t \odot \tanh(c_t)
\end{align*}
```

```latex

\end{align*}
